column2: #| fig-cap: "Figure 4. Mean (± SE) benthic category cover per site. Points show individual transect values. Panels separate categories for clarity."
# Reshape to long format so all five categories can be faceted in one plot.
# free_y scale lets each panel use its own y-axis range, making variation
# visible even for low-cover categories like sponge.
aes(x = dive_site, y = pct, colour = dive_site, fill = dive_site)) +
labs(title = "Benthic Cover by Site (mean ± SE + raw transects)",
